data.title: Google In Talks To Rent Nvidia's Blackwell Chips From CoreWeave: Report
data.description: Alphabet Inc.'s Google is working on increasing AI and computing resources to support its growing range of applications.

data.title: Larry Summers Warns Trump's Tariffs Will Deliver 'Oil Crisis-Like Shock,' Slash $30 Trillion From Economy As Markets Plunge
data.description: Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers warned on Thursday that Trump's tariffs will impose an "oil crisis-like shock" to the economy.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower Following Trump's Tariffs: 'Worse Than The Worst Case Scenario,' Says Analyst
data.description: U.S. stock futures plummeted on Thursday after advancing on Wednesday. Futures of benchmark indices were down over 2% in premarket trading.

data.title: Global Markets Rattle With Trump's Tariff, Dollar Weakens, Oil Tanks - Global Markets Today While US Slept
Ray Dalio Warns Of 'Abrupt, Unconventional Changes' In Markets: Here's How The 'Tariff Machine' Affects Currency, Monetary And Fiscal Policies
data.description: Ray Dalio issues a warning about the economic ripples of escalating tariffs, revealing their impact on global markets.
